title_guess: Short outings: Little Gaddesden christening & Malvern

pages.text:
Welshpool. We drove on home. We had had a marvellous, sunburnt holiday, one of the best ever. But on the Friday + Saturday following it has poured rain.

May 31st Sunday
     We Jill set off with Kate Warburton to Charlotte Maxwell's christening. John arrived + took Kate back to London. The Christening was at __Little Gaddesden__, + the reception/lunch was at Mrs. della Casa's house. It was a lovely warm sunny day, with 40 children. We gave Charlotte her father's school tuck box. David Maxwell came with Imogen + Iona, but Maxine was at another christening in London.
June 9th
     Simon, Eve, Thomas, Charles (chickenpox) went over to Malvern for Thomas to meet Boyle + Urbanchick, + all to meet the Hills. A good, interesting day.
